design_direction: Minimalist, premium, structured (Trello/Notion/Stripe inspired). Mobile-first, F-pattern reading flow.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-tight text-[#0F172A]

surfaces_and_components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_components.button_primary: bg-[#F97316] text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#EA580C] transition-colors shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
surfaces_and_components.button_secondary: bg-white text-[#0F172A] font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-3 border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:bg-[#F7F9FC] transition-colors
surfaces_and_components.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E2E8F0]/50

animations.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
animations.count_up: Use react-countup or framer-motion for numbers in ROI and Tool Cost sections

sections.name: Header
sections.requirements: Sticky nav, Logo left, Links center, FR/EN language switcher and Primary CTA right.

sections.name: Hero
sections.requirements: Headline: 'Centralisez vos outils. Activez vos données. Générez du revenu.' Subhead below. Primary CTA + Secondary CTA. Abstract 3D shape as visual anchor on right (or center).

sections.name: Boîte à outils (Bento Grid)
sections.requirements: 8 modules: CRM, Projets, Playbooks, Signatures, Calendrier, Finance, Réunions IA, Mémos vocaux. Use Lucide icons. Card style with light shadow.

sections.name: Coût des outils (Checklist)
sections.requirements: Interactive checklist. Left side: List of standard tools (e.g., Slack, Notion, Asana) with toggle switches and their typical monthly costs. Right side: Live total cost vs SAKSAE fixed cost. Count-up animation for the savings.

sections.name: ROI Calculator
sections.requirements: Sliders for Team Size, Hourly Rate, Hours Saved/week. Live calculation of 'Argent économisé par an'. Big bold numbers using count-up.

sections.name: AI Action Feed
sections.requirements: Headline 'L'IA qui agit, pas qui suggère'. Vertical feed of Trello-like cards. Each card has an action (e.g., 'Relance client envoyée'), context, and impact (€). Auto-scrolling or staggered entrance animation.

sections.name: Transformation Avant/Après
sections.requirements: Visual comparison. Left: Chaos (Messy desk image), Right: Clarity (Clean desk image) + digital overlays.

sections.name: Use Cases
sections.requirements: Tabs: CEO, Sales, RH, Finance. Clicking tab reveals specific benefits and a related feature graphic.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.requirements: Simple transparent pricing tiers. Highlighting the 'all-in-one' value.

sections.name: CTA Final
sections.requirements: Deep blue background (#312E81), white text, Orange CTA button. Lead capture form embedded or linked.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, tabs, inputs, toggles, language switch) MUST use data-testid. E.g., data-testid='cta-hero', data-testid='tab-sales'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement mobile-first responsive design. Use Shadcn components for Tabs, Sliders, and Switch (for the cost checklist). Build the Bento grid using Tailwind CSS grid. Ensure all images are lazy-loaded and have alt text. Adhere strictly to the color palette and typography rules.
